lean:
theorem Artin_exercise_11_4_6b {F : Type*} [Field F] [Fintype F] (hF : card F = 7) :
  Irreducible (X ^ 2 + 1 : Polynomial F)
reasoning: The informal statement asks to show x^2+1 is irreducible in F_7[x]. The Lean signature quantifies over any finite field F of cardinality 7; since all fields of cardinality 7 are isomorphic to F_7 (the prime field of characteristic 7), the assertion is equivalent to irreducibility of X^2+1 over F_7. The conclusion `Irreducible (X^2+1 : Polynomial F)` is exactly the polynomial-ring irreducibility claim. No hypotheses are missing or extraneous, and the type encoding faithfully captures the intended ambient ring.
